data.title: Dow falls amid Trump trade deal, crypto vote faces setback. Nvidia stock surges on AI chip sales to China.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline in a mixed trading session. One noteworthy highlight was Nvidia's stock, which saw a surge due to increased sales of AI chips to China. This occurred amid news of the Dow falling amidst uncertainties surrounding the Trump trade deal. Additionally, there was a setback in a crypto vote. For live coverage and more updates on market trends, refer to the latest from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Report: Trump considers executive order allowing retirement funds access to crypto. White House says official details only from Trump.
data.description: According to a White House representative, Kush Desai, it has been emphasized to Cointelegraph that any official decisions must be directly communicated by President Trump himself.

data.title: Hamilton Lane boosts SCOPE Fund with Securitize and Wormhole, expanding capabilities across Ethereum and Optimism chains.
data.description: Hamilton Lane has partnered with Securitize and Wormhole to widen the reach of its SCOPE Fund multichain platform. This collaboration aims to boost interoperability on Ethereum and Optimism.

data.description: In recent developments, EFGH has been actively increasing its footprint in Africa, with notable progress being made in the Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), Zambia, and Ghana over the last two months. data.title: Blue Rose Foundation names Dominnique Karetsos as Chief Impact Officer on July 1, 2025. She will lead global anti-trafficking and advocacy expansion.
data.description: Blue Rose Foundation, a prominent nonprofit organization focused on combatting human trafficking and exploitation, has appointed Dominnique Karetsos as its new Chief Impact Officer starting from July 1, 2025. With extensive experience in nonprofit advancement, social justice, and fundraising, Karetsos will lead the Foundation's expansion strategies. This appointment marks a significant development in the Foundation's efforts to address these critical issues.
